issue.message: READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE is deprecated (and is not granted) when targeting Android 13+. If you need to query or interact with MediaStore or media files on the shared storage, you should instead use one or more new storage permissions: `READ_MEDIA_IMAGES`, `READ_MEDIA_VIDEO` or `READ_MEDIA_AUDIO`.
WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE no longer provides write access when targeting Android 10, unless you use `requestLegacyExternalStorage`
Reflective access to mFactory2, which is not part of the public SDK and therefore likely to change in future Android releases
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES javadoc for details.
Reflective access to mAttachInfo will throw an exception when targeting API 34 and above
Attribute `enableOnBackInvokedCallback` is only used in API level 33 and higher (current min is 31)

It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 29

Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 29
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 29. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
This field leaks a context object
This library supports using KSP instead of kapt, which greatly improves performance. Learn more: https://developer.android.com/studio/build/migrate-to-ksp
Use a `layout_width` of `0dp` instead of `193dp` for better performance
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/white` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.HotKey`)

Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Hardcoded string "앱 로고", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "HOTKEY", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "민감한 개인정보는 민, 형사상 문제가 될 수 있습니다", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1: android:text="민감한 개인정보는 민, 형사상 문제가 될 수 있습니다"

issue.message: Hardcoded string "카카오 로그인", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "로그인은 필수이며, 서비스 이용 약관 및 개인정보 처리방침에 동의하는 것으로 간주됩니다.", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1: android:text="로그인은 필수이며, 서비스 이용 약관 및 개인정보 처리방침에 동의하는 것으로 간주됩니다."
